intro: Abacopteris holophylla, also known as the "Pine fern," is a type of plant species belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve skin health, and boost the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Abacopteris holophylla include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and polysaccharides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Abacopteris holophylla is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
